arts.ttl: Bayern & Real Madrid eye Man Utd's Dalot - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United's Diogo Dalot might move in the summer, Viktor Gyokeres continues to attract Premier League interest and Newcastle want Ipswich's Liam Delap.

arts.ttl: Who Are Bayern Munich Playing in the Champions League Quarterfinals?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich advanced to the Champions League quarterfinal after eliminating Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Kane on beating Leverkusen 5-0 on aggregate: "Shows the type of team we are"
arts.sum: Harry Kane was proud after Bayern Munich beat Bayer Leverkusen for the second time within a week to ensure progress to the quarter-finals of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Musiala after hitting the woodwork twice: "I'm really annoyed about it, but we won"
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala was pleased with Bayern's performance against Bayer Leverkusen, but was "really annoyed" that he hit the woodwork twice.

arts.ttl: Kane and Davies complete emphatic Bayern Munich win over Leverkusen
arts.sum: Normal service has been resumed in Germany. It has in the Champions League, too, given Bayern Munich are in the quarter-finals for a sixth consecutive year. If they treat Inter with the same disdain they showed Bayer Leverkusen, whose brief spell as domestic kryptonite appears to be comprehensively over, then they may move closer to winning the trophy on home soil in May. They never looked like losing even a fraction of the three-goal lead amassed in the first leg and could count once again on Harry Kane, whose simple opener and subsequent assist for Alphonso Davies floored a weakened Leverkusen. The home side could point to the absence of Florian Wirtz, whose next action in this competition will come in Bayern’s colours if his suitors have their way. The playmaker’s weekend injury meant that, to all intents and purposes, dreams of a comeback were over as soon as they had begun. Not even Xabi Alonso’s magic touch could compensate and a team that had outplayed Bayern here in the Bundesliga last month looked bereft of confidence here. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Harry Kane makes Champions League history as Bayern Munich star achieves unprecedented English feat
arts.sum: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane writes a new page of Champions League history with his opening goal against Bayer Leverkusen in the second leg of their last-16 tie.

arts.ttl: Man United set for summer cash windful as Bayern Munich and Real Madrid circle defender
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have joined Real Madrid in the race to sign Manchester United defender Diogo Dalot, according to reports. Outlet TeamTalk have revealed that the 25-year-old has caught the eye of Bayern boss Vincent Kompany thanks to his remarkable consistency and adaptability – while he is also admired by those at Rea Madrid. The wingback’s […] The post Man United set for summer cash windful as Bayern Munich and Real Madrid circle defender appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Liverpool-PSG, Leverkusen-Bayern
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Tuesday's Champions League action as Liverpool take on Paris Saint-Germain, Leverkusen take on Bayern and Inter take on Feyenoord.

arts.ttl: Report: Leipzig pip Bayern to 16-year-old Swedish talent
arts.sum: RB Leipzig have captured yet another talented teenager ahead of other clubs competing young Swede.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany counting on young players to shape club’s future
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies, Aleksandar Pavlović, Jamal Musiala, Jonas Urbig, Hiroki Itō, Tom Bischof (arriving in the summer from Hoffenheim), and Josip Stanišić could be key players for Bayern Munich moving forward. Knowing this, Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany wants to see each continue to develop and wants to help push the players to maximize their respective talent.
